report: R62 AUTO to MANUAL parameter takeover closure

changed: AUTO to MANUAL takeover target selection

problem_cause: AUTO state first drag could hit boundary or duplicate guards before pending/manual state was established.
When the first target equaled the current AUTO runtime value, no manual runtime write was dispatched.
UI could remain in AUTO because pending manual state was never created.

implementation.force_write_behavior: AUTO boundary takeover can dispatch current boundary tick to establish manual mode instead of returning false.
ui_sync: WB pending value forces manual mode display.
ISO pending value forces manual mode display.
Shutter pending value forces manual mode display.
EV pending value forces manual mode display.
WB/ISO/Shutter AUTO controls remain usable during pending manual state.

risks: If a camera reports an AUTO value at the exact edge of the supported range, the first outward drag may primarily establish manual mode with minimal visual change.
True-device validation is still required for WB AUTO first-drag behavior.
next_recommendation: Run R63 true-device retest focused on AUTO first-drag takeover and R61 boundary behavior.
